---
title: "UIAO Substrate Status"
description: "At-a-glance view of the substrate manifest, workspace contract, active adapters, and CI enforcement stack."
uiao.id: narrative-substrate-status
uiao.status: Current
uiao.owner: WhalerMike
uiao.tags: [status, reference, substrate, adapter, ci]
provenance:
  source_commit: main
  derived_from:
    - src/uiao/canon/substrate-manifest.yaml
    - src/uiao/canon/workspace-contract.yaml
    - src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml
    - src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml
    - src/uiao/canon/document-registry.yaml
  derived_at: "2026-04-17"
  derived_by: "substrate status page вЂ” human-readable snapshot of machine-readable substrate state"
---

# UIAO Substrate Status

Snapshot of the substrate's current state, derived from the canonical artifacts listed in the provenance block above. This page is regenerable: running `make walk` produces the same facts in machine form; this page renders them for humans.

## Topology

Post-consolidation (April 2026, ADR-028 / ADR-032), the original three-module
topology (`core/`, `docs/`, `impl/`) collapsed into a single Python package
at [`src/uiao/`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/src/uiao) plus
the documentation site at [`docs/`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/docs).
The substrate manifest ([`src/uiao/canon/substrate-manifest.yaml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/substrate-manifest.yaml),
UIAO_200) still carries the pre-consolidation module list for historical
provenance; new code lands under `src/uiao/`.

| Module | Role | Canon consumer | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| [`src/uiao/`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/src/uiao) | authority + implementation | вЂ” | Schemas, canon documents, control library, Python CLI, generators, adapters, substrate walker |
| [`docs/`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/docs) | consumer | yes | Articles, guides, narrative, rendered Quarto site |

Workspace root: `$UIAO_WORKSPACE_ROOT` (never hardcoded вЂ” see [`AGENTS.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/AGENTS.md) for the canon-consumer convention).

## Adapter registry

Source: [`src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml) + [`src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml).

### Modernization adapters (change-making)

| Adapter | Status | Phase | Mission class | FedRAMP | Vendor |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `entra-id` | active | phase-1 | integration | вЂ” | Microsoft |
| `m365` | active | phase-1 | integration | вЂ” | Microsoft |
| `service-now` | active | phase-1 | integration | вЂ” | ServiceNow |
| `palo-alto` | active | phase-1 | integration | вЂ” | Palo Alto Networks |
| `scuba` | active | phase-1 | integration | вЂ” | CISA |
| `terraform` | active | phase-1 | integration | вЂ” | HashiCorp / OpenTofu |
| `cyberark` | active | phase-1 | integration | вЂ” | CyberArk |
| `infoblox` | active | phase-1 | integration | **Moderate, CDM-integrated** | Infoblox |
| `bluecat-address-manager` | active | phase-1 | integration | вЂ” | BlueCat |
| `mainframe` | reserved | phase-planning | integration | вЂ” | IBM |

**9 of 10 active.** Only `mainframe` remains reserved вЂ” blocks on z/OS Connect / MQ bridge infrastructure (see its `notes:` field).

### Conformance adapters (read-only)

See `src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml` for the complete list. Notable: `scubagear` (CISA SCuBA assessor).

### Test-tier status

Per [UIAO_131 Adapter Test Strategy](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/specs/adapter-test-strategy.md), every adapter is tested across three tiers: live commercial tenant (tier 1), contract fixtures (tier 2), reference deployment against a partner agency's GCC-Moderate tenant (tier 3). UIAO lives outside the federal boundary вЂ” this table is the honest map of what's been exercised.

| Adapter | Registry status | Tier 1 (live) | Tier 2 (contract) | Tier 3 (reference) | Gate achievable |
|---|---|:-:|:-:|:-:|---|
| `entra-id` | active | вЏі pending (live tenant) | вњ… scheduler-wired | рџљ« none | dispatches through UIAO_100 scheduler; live tenant via M365 Developer Program pending |
| `m365` | active | вЏі pending | вЏі pending | рџљ« none | fixture setup required for `beta` |
| `service-now` | active | вЏі pending | вЏі pending | рџљ« none | vendor developer program sign-up pending |
| `palo-alto` | active | вЏі pending | вЏі pending | рџљ« none | vendor sandbox pending |
| `scuba` | active | вЏі pending | вЏі pending | рџљ« none | ScubaGear fixture + live run |
| `terraform` | active | вњ… **55 tests** | вњ… fixture + scheduler-wired | рџљ« none | first real adapter wired into UIAO_100 scheduler (В§1.5) |
| `cyberark` | active | вЏі pending | вЏі pending | рџљ« none | vendor developer program pending |
| `infoblox` | active | рџџҐ blocked | вЏі pending | рџљ« none | No public developer sandbox вЂ” exclusion per UIAO_131 В§5.1 |
| `bluecat-address-manager` | active | рџџҐ excluded | вЏі pending | рџљ« none | Vendor-contact-only access вЂ” exclusion per UIAO_131 В§5.1 |
| `mainframe` | reserved | N/A | N/A | N/A | No impl; no target |

Legend: вњ… green В· вЏі pending (author work required) В· рџџҐ blocked/excluded В· рџљ« requires partner agency В· N/A not applicable

**Reality at writing:** zero adapters have completed tier-1 or tier-2 evidence. All currently-`active` adapter registry entries sit above the UIAO_131 conformance gate threshold. That's drift вЂ” flagged below.

## Canon invariants

Every registered modernization adapter satisfies the four canon invariants, schema-enforced:

- `gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate` *(Amazon Connect exception noted per-adapter)*
- `ssot-mutation: never`
- `certificate-anchored: true`
- `object-identity-only: true`

## Document registry

Source: [`src/uiao/canon/document-registry.yaml`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/document-registry.yaml).

**Reserved ranges:**

| Range | Purpose | Examples |
|---|---|---|
| `UIAO_001` | Single Source of Truth | `UIAO-SSOT.md` |
| `UIAO_002вЂ“099` | Top-level canon documents | UIAO_002 SCuBA Spec, UIAO_003 Adapter Segmentation Overview, UIAO_004 Executive Orders |
| `UIAO_100вЂ“199` | Subsystem specifications | UIAO_100 Compliance Orchestrator, UIAO_110 Drift Engine Spec, UIAO_121вЂ“124 Adapter-framework specs |
| `UIAO_200вЂ“299` | Operational / runtime artifacts | UIAO_200 Substrate Manifest, UIAO_201 Workspace Contract |
| `UIAO_900вЂ“999` | Test fixtures | вЂ” |

**31 documents registered** (32 with UIAO_131). Of those, the implementation-reality map:

| UIAO_NNN | Doc | Spec | Impl | Deployed | Real today? |
|---|---|:-:|:-:|:-:|---|
| UIAO_001 | [SSOT](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/UIAO-SSOT.md) | вњ… | n/a (doctrine) | referenced across substrate | вњ… |
| UIAO_002 | [SCuBA Spec](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/UIAO_002_SCuBA_Technical_Specification_v1.0.md) | вњ… | impl/ CLI exists | partial (no live run) | рџџЎ partial |
| UIAO_003 | [Adapter Segmentation](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/UIAO_003_Adapter_Segmentation_Overview_v1.0.md) | вњ… | registry enforces | 10 registered adapters | вњ… |
| UIAO_004 | [Executive Orders](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/compliance/executive-orders.md) | вњ… | n/a (doctrine) | вЂ” | вњ… declared |
| UIAO_100 | [Compliance Orchestrator](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/specs/Compliance-Orchestrator.md) | вњ… | scheduler shipped | `uiao orchestrator schedule`; 14 unit + 1 e2e test | рџџЎ partial |
| UIAO_101 | Platform Overview | вњ… | partial | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_102 | Platform Services Layer | вњ… | partial | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_103 | [Spec-Test Enforcement](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/specs/UIAO-Spec-Test-Enforcement.md) | вњ… | enforcement mechanism shipped | RFC 2119 audit + CI gate; coverage doc baselined | вњ… complete |
| UIAO_104 | Test Harness & CI | вњ… | impl | CI running | вњ… |
| UIAO_105 | Auditor API | вњ… | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_106 | Compliance CLI | вњ… | impl | `uiao` CLI ships in v0.2.1 | вњ… |
| UIAO_107 | Collector Interface | вњ… | partial | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_108 | CQL | вњ… | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_109 | Data Lake Model | вњ… | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_110 | Drift Engine | вњ… | DRIFT-SCHEMA + DRIFT-PROVENANCE only | walker runs | рџџЎ partial (2/5 classes) |
| UIAO_111 | Enforcement Runtime | вњ… | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_112 | Multi-Tenant Isolation | вњ… | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_113 | [Evidence Graph](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/specs/graph-schema.md) | вњ… | working | scheduler-run ingestion + 4-emitter OSCAL augmentation + back-matter link resources; 62 tests | вњ… |
| UIAO_114 | HA / Fault Tolerance | вњ… | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_115 | Performance Engineering | вњ… | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_116 | EPL | вњ… | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_117 | Recovery Layer | вњ… | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_118 | Release Engineering | вњ… | impl | release.yml signs v0.2.1 | вњ… |
| UIAO_119 | Tenancy Strategy | вњ… | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_120 | Zero-Trust Integration | вњ… | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_121 | Adapter Conformance TP | вњ… (template) | вЂ” | 0 adapters filled | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_122 | Adapter Developer Training | вњ… (subset of UIAO_125) | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_123 | Adapter Integration TP | вњ… (template) | вЂ” | 0 adapters filled | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_124 | Adapter Ops Runbook | вњ… | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_125 | Training Program | вњ… | вЂ” | program not running | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_126 | Test Plans Program | вњ… | вЂ” | catalog published, plans partial | рџџЎ partial |
| UIAO_127 | Project Plans Program | вњ… | вЂ” | no templates instantiated | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_128 | Education Program | вњ… | вЂ” | 0 walkthroughs run | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_129 | Application Identity Model | draft | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ draft only |
| UIAO_130 | App Identity Onboarding Runbook | draft | вЂ” | вЂ” | вљ пёЏ draft only |
| UIAO_131 | Adapter Test Strategy | вњ… | вЂ” | 0 adapters have any tier evidence | вљ пёЏ aspirational |
| UIAO_200 | Substrate Manifest | вњ… | impl enforces | substrate walker uses daily | вњ… |
| UIAO_201 | Workspace Contract | вњ… | impl enforces | `$UIAO_WORKSPACE_ROOT` in use | вњ… |

### Summary

- **вњ… Real today:** 8 of 37 artifacts (UIAO_001, 003, 004, 104, 106, 118, 200, 201)
- **рџџЎ Partially implemented:** 5 (UIAO_002, 103, 110, 113, 126)
- **вљ пёЏ Aspirational or draft:** 24

That's the honest state. An aspirational banner is applied per ADR-030 В§6 to pages describing вљ пёЏ and рџџЎ artifacts.

## CI enforcement stack

Source: [`.github/workflows/`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/tree/main/.github/workflows).

| Workflow | Status | Trigger |
|---|---|---|
| `schema-validation.yml` | **blocking** | Canon / schema PRs |
| `pytest.yml` | **blocking** (substrate + full impl) | `impl/**` PRs |
| `substrate-drift.yml` | **blocking** | Substrate / registry PRs |
| `metadata-validator.yml` | **blocking** | Canon doc PRs |
| `quarto.yml` | **blocking** render; deploy on main | `docs/**` PRs |
| `ruff.yml` | **blocking** | `impl/**` PRs |
| `link-check.yml` | soft-fail | Any Markdown/Quarto PR + weekly cron |
| `release.yml` | tag-triggered | `v*.*.*` push в†’ wheel + sdist + CycloneDX SBOM + sigstore signing |
| `release-drafter.yml` | continuous | Every main push / PR label вЂ” maintains the draft release |

**6 of 7 substantive workflows are blocking.** The seventh (link-check) remains soft-fail until the baseline is burned down.

## Drift taxonomy

Five classes defined in [`docs/docs/16_DriftDetectionStandard.qmd`](16_DriftDetectionStandard.qmd):

| Class | Detected by | Severity max | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `DRIFT-SCHEMA` | `uiao substrate walk` | P1 | **implemented** |
| `DRIFT-PROVENANCE` | `uiao substrate walk` | P1 | **implemented** |
| `DRIFT-SEMANTIC` | runtime вЂ” `src/uiao/freshness/drift_semantic.py` evaluates scheduler-run evidence against per-adapter `freshness-window-hours`; fallback chain registryв†’familyв†’global | P2 | вњ… complete |
| `DRIFT-AUTHZ` | runtime вЂ” `src/uiao/governance/drift.py::classify_authz_drift` (state-diff: role/delegation/escalation) **+** `src/uiao/governance/consent_envelope.py::ConsentEnvelopeValidator` (registry consent envelope: out-of-scope object access). Substrate walker scans both registries for missing/empty `scope:` declarations | P1 | вњ… complete |
| `DRIFT-IDENTITY` | runtime вЂ” `src/uiao/governance/drift.py::classify_identity_drift` (state-diff: OrgPath / lifecycle / required-field validation). Issuer-chain runtime validation pending | P1 | рџџЎ partial |

Runtime classes have their home in `src/uiao/canon/specs/drift.md` (UIAO_110); implementation is tracked as future engineering work (see ADR-029 В§Consequences).

## Aspirational-content triage

A grep-heuristic scan across all rendered `.qmd` and `.md` in `docs/` found **283 files with 692 matches** for aspirational-signal phrases (`not yet implemented | coming soon | TBD | TODO | placeholder | aspirational | proposed | draft | stub | to be defined | planned | roadmap | will be | future | intends to`).

The scan is intentionally noisy вЂ” about 30вЂ“40% are false positives (session logs using "planned" in past-tense context, status dashboards naturally listing roadmaps, glossaries defining terms). Full triage report: [`inbox/drafts/aspirational-candidates-2026-04-17.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/inbox/drafts/aspirational-candidates-2026-04-17.md).

**Mechanically flagged as aspirational** (via Lua filter + `aspirational: true` frontmatter вЂ” see PR #57):

- All program pages (UIAO_125вЂ“128) and narrative companions вЂ” 9 pages
- Series landings + book landing вЂ” 4 pages
- All `PHASE5_*.qmd` files вЂ” 8 pages
- All `customer-documents/validation-suites/adapters/*` вЂ” 13 pages
- All `customer-documents/adapter-specs/*` вЂ” 7 pages
- `docs/docs/canon/migration-plan.md`, `docs/docs/mvp-roadmap.qmd`

**Total flagged в‰€ 44 pages (~9% of the 504 rendered surfaces).** Selective flagging preserves signal вЂ” a banner on half the site is noise.

The remaining 263 hits are under per-file review; not mass-flagged pending author judgment.

## Optimization posture

Cumulative from the consolidation (2026-04-17):

- **History preserved:** 3,549 commits across the four predecessor repos
- **Working-tree reduction:** ~290 MB (128.9 MB via pngquant, 160 MB of tracked build artifacts retired, 795 KB of junk text files removed)
- **Dead code retired:** 38 Python files (~1,600 LOC) of ARC-5 scaffolding under `directory_migration/` + 3 stub duplicate provider adapters
- **Quality burn-down:** 16 ruff errors fixed (gate flipped to blocking), 4 slug-style `document_id`s renumbered, 10 mechanical stale-ref fixes

## How to verify any of this

```bash
# Validate schemas (canon YAML/JSON vs their JSON Schemas)
make schemas

# Walk the substrate (structural + provenance drift)
make walk

# Run substrate walker tests only (fast)
make test-substrate

# Render this page as part of the full site
make docs
```

Every cell above is regenerable from the canonical artifacts. If this page disagrees with the live `src/uiao/canon/*.yaml`, **the canon wins** вЂ” this page is a derived view, not a source.
